name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed output typical of AI tools.
problem: Professionals waste hours wrestling with slide design tools or end up with AI-generated presentations that look templated and impersonal. Chronicle 2.0 aims to give teams a faster path to visually distinctive presentations that still feel human and on-brand. It reduces the gap between a rough narrative and a boardroom-ready deck.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks that stand out from AI-generated noise
Creating client-facing proposals and sales presentations quickly
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks without a designer
Repurposing written content into structured, visual slide narratives
